title: /drain Implementation Plan
summary: Step-by-step implementation guide for shipping a /drain slash command, draining-beads skill, and formula-drain.toml orchestrating autonomous bead iteration via Claude Code's /goal.
notes: Implementation plan/runbook documenting 12 sequential tasks. Companion spec document (2026-05-22-drain-skill-design.md) holds the authoritative technical specification and architectural decisions. Classified as DOC (process guidance) rather than PRD or SPEC because it is procedural and process-focused; the actual requirements and specifications reside in the companion spec.
